creator: freebsd@amc-os.com
text:
I upgraded my system from 7.2-RELEASE to 7.2-STABLE and amdpm no longer works. I tried rebooting on previous kernel and it works again. I used the same kernel config. 

Here is the output with 7.2-RELEASE :

I noticed it because mbmon is no longer able to get any monitoring value from smbus :
 Testing Reg's at SMBus
ioctl(smb0:open): No such file or directory
SMBus[AMD756/766/768/8111] found, but No HWM available on it!!

How-To-Repeat: cvsup RELENG_7 instead of RELENG_7_2
make buildkernel
